ㅤ

DOUBLE UPLOAD!!!

Mannnn I am so tired of having bad luck 😭

So, for context, I'm fairly shy (ignore my horribly in detail smut bots) and have a hard time asking people to hang out and what not, but on top of that, my luck is absolute SHITTTT

For example, y'all remember that friend I was complaining about a while ago? The past summer I was trying to be brave and initiate hanging out, so I texted her yadda yadda

First attempt - failed, she was busy with something

Second attempt - failed, she was busy again

Third attempt - failed, busy

Just to make it clear I wouldn't blame anyone for being busy I actually just have the worst luck ever 😟

Another example, which is more recent...

I wanted to hangout with my siblings at the mall (I'm the oldest) since we rarely do and I've been wanting to go to the mall real bad. My sister just seemed so uninterested and it completely ruined my vibe cause I was so excited 😭 we ended up not going

And then I asked my brother even more recently if he wanted to go to the mall with me, he said yes but then in the morning after I had showered and gotten ready he didn't wanna go anymore 🥲

It's not all bad though, I have one friend who I'm hanging out with on Thursday and she seems pretty pumped about it so A WIN IS A WIN 🙏

moving on,

For some info on the potion, the effects are supposed to last a couple minutes (depending on how much was drank) so he's going to be a truther for a while (if the AI actually understands and cooperates I mean 😭)

anyways,

Enjoy!!!

Love,

Mama Down
